name: blockchain-verification-mcp
description: > **By [MEOK AI Labs](https://meok.ai)** — MEOK AI Labs MCP Server

tools.name: mint_certificate
tools.description: Mint a blockchain-backed certificate with SHA-256 hash chain verification.

tools.name: verify_certificate
tools.description: Verify a certificate's authenticity by checking its hash chain and signatures.

tools.name: audit_trail
tools.description: Get the full audit trail for a certificate including all verification events.

tools.name: integrity_check
tools.description: Run integrity checks on the certificate store to detect tampering or corruption.
